message:
🐛 Fix header size limit and CI kubectl action

- Increase Fiber ReadBufferSize from 4096 to 16384 to handle OAuth tokens
- Fix azure/setup-kubectl action to use v3.2 (v4.1.0 commit was invalid)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -80,7 +80,7 @@ jobs:
         uses: actions/checkout@11bd71901bbe5b1630ceea73d27597364c9af683 # v4.2.2
 
       - name: Set up kubectl
-        uses: azure/setup-kubectl@5b6a82e5edc8d29bf9a2ab82503fec96e0f70f83 # v4.1.0
+        uses: azure/setup-kubectl@901a10e89ea615cf61f57ac05cecdf23e7de06d8 # v3.2
 
       - name: Set up Helm
         uses: azure/setup-helm@b9e51907a09c216f16ebe8536097933489208112 # v4.3.0
